mapper.select:
SELECT CONCAT('', e.id) AS entry_id, CASE WHEN f.id IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CONCAT('', f.id) END AS file_id, e.entry_type, e.entry_code, e.title, e.secret_level, e.version, e.release_date, f.file_ext AS file_type, e.profession_code, e.author_name, e.info_status, f.original_file_name, f.file_url, e.created_at, e.updated_at
ORDER BY e.created_at DESC, e.id DESC LIMIT #{request.offset}, #{request.pageSize}

SELECT CONCAT('', e.id) AS entry_id, e.entry_type, e.entry_code, e.title, e.keywords, e.version, e.project_name, e.release_date, e.system_source, e.profession_code, e.author_name, e.secret_level, e.info_status, CASE WHEN f.id IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CONCAT('', f.id) END AS file_id, f.original_file_name, f.file_ext AS file_type, f.file_size, f.file_url, f.upload_status, f.uploaded_at FROM knowledge_entry e LEFT JOIN knowledge_file f ON e.id = f.entry_id AND f.is_current = 1 AND f.status = 1 WHERE e.id = #{entryId} AND e.status = 1 ORDER BY f.uploaded_at DESC, f.id DESC LIMIT 1
